Landing.badgeText: Built for Indian Patients · Powered by AI
Landing.heroSubtitle: Upload lab reports, track medications, and navigate PM-JAY insurance schemes — all in plain language you can actually understand.
Landing.sectionGapsSubtitle: Common problems every Indian patient faces — and how we fix them.
Landing.gap1Desc: Lab reports filled with medical terms your doctor never has time to explain clearly.
Landing.gap2Desc: Critical doses forgotten with no smart reminders to keep adherence on track.
Landing.gap3Desc: PM-JAY and state schemes that nobody can navigate without expert guidance.
Landing.sectionStepsSubtitle: Three simple steps to take absolute control of your health journey.
Landing.step1Desc: Snap a photo or upload a PDF. Any lab report, X-ray, or discharge summary works.
Landing.step2Desc: Our AI reads the medical jargon and translates every finding into simple language.
Landing.step3Desc: Get clear summaries, questions to ask your doctor, and insurance scheme guidance.
Landing.sectionFeaturesTitle: Everything you need in one place
Landing.sectionFeaturesSubtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools designed specifically for the modern Indian healthcare experience.
Landing.feature1Desc: AI explains your lab results in plain language you can actually understand.
Landing.feature2Desc: Ask anything about your health history. Get context-aware answers.
Landing.feature3Desc: Never miss a dose. Smart schedules with adherence logging.
Landing.feature4Desc: Find PM-JAY schemes that cover your specific procedure effortlessly.
Landing.feature5Desc: Your complete medical journey visualized in a single chronological view.
Landing.feature6Desc: Doctors monitor patient adherence and flag at-risk patients instantly.

Dashboard.welcomeText: Here's what's happening with your health today.
Dashboard.uploadYourFirstReport: Upload your first medical report to get started.

Settings.title: Account Settings
Settings.subtitle: Manage your security, preferences, and notifications
Settings.deleteWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
Settings.pushDesc: Receive desktop and mobile notifications when it's time to take your medication.

Profile.title: Medical Profile
Profile.subtitle: Your central health passport. Keep this updated for accurate AI analysis.
